thesis.weak_thesis_rejected: Pure GPT always hallucinates and CASULO simply prevents hallucination.
thesis.strong_thesis: Models can produce plausible and even prudent answers while remaining operationally insufficient because they lack real state, schema, repo context, evidence, gates, blocked actions, validators and permitted next actions.
thesis.rag_distinction: RAG improves retrieval and context. CASULO governs action through operational state, gates, evidence, blocked actions, validation and human review.
thesis.git_codex_distinction: Git versions changes and Codex can implement when authorized. CASULO defines whether implementation is allowed, what contract must be respected and which evidence/gates are required.

failure_modes.name: generic_parser_generation
failure_modes.description: The model generates a generic parser that compiles but does not match the real workbook, file format, schema or field contract.
failure_modes.typical_prompt: Crie um parser para esta planilha.
failure_modes.pure_failure_pattern: Assumes generic sheet names, columns, types, required fields and outputs.
failure_modes.casulo_control: Require real workbook inventory, schema, field mapping, fixtures, golden output and validator before implementation.

failure_modes.name: schema_invention
failure_modes.description: The model invents fields, enum values, JSON structure, workbook tabs or validation rules not present in the source artifact.
failure_modes.typical_prompt: Gere o modelo de dados baseado nisso.
failure_modes.casulo_control: Bind generation to declared schema, source inventory, contract and diffable evidence.

failure_modes.name: file_structure_hallucination
failure_modes.description: The model assumes paths, files, folders or workbook structures that do not exist.
failure_modes.typical_prompt: Corrija o fluxo usando os arquivos atuais.
failure_modes.pure_failure_pattern: References missing files or stale paths.
failure_modes.casulo_control: Require repo/file inventory and path existence checks before patch planning.

failure_modes.name: repo_state_mismatch
failure_modes.description: The model proposes a patch based on stale or reconstructed repo state, ignoring current branch, diff, previous commits or generated outputs.
failure_modes.typical_prompt: Segue de onde paramos e corrige isso.
failure_modes.pure_failure_pattern: Patch targets old architecture or already-fixed files.
failure_modes.casulo_control: Use branch, commit, git status, file tree, recent tags and validators as state packet.

failure_modes.name: contract_omission
failure_modes.description: The model implements or recommends changes without explicit contract, acceptance criteria or expected validation output.
failure_modes.pure_failure_pattern: Code may compile but cannot be audited against a contract.
failure_modes.casulo_control: Require contract, schema, checks, expected outputs and blocked actions before implementation.

failure_modes.name: testless_code_generation
failure_modes.description: The model generates code without tests, fixtures or validation commands.
failure_modes.pure_failure_pattern: Implementation appears complete but has no proof.
failure_modes.casulo_control: Require fixture, golden output, validator and PASS/FAIL evidence.

failure_modes.name: unsafe_merge_suggestion
failure_modes.description: The model suggests automatic merge, direct push or implementation execution before evidence and human review.
failure_modes.casulo_control: Enforce blocked_actions: automatic_merge, codex_execution, implementation_execution unless explicitly approved.

failure_modes.name: conditional_client_claim_leakage
failure_modes.description: The model says a client-facing claim is acceptable if generic criteria are met, without knowing whether they are met.
failure_modes.typical_prompt: Podemos apresentar isso ao cliente como evidência validada?
failure_modes.pure_failure_pattern: Answers with a plausible checklist and conditional yes.
failure_modes.casulo_control: Require explicit gate, evidence status, output_mode and client_facing_claim blocked/unblocked state.

failure_modes.name: generic_validation_laundering
failure_modes.description: The model turns an unknown validation state into a generic validation checklist, making the answer sound governed while remaining unaudited.
failure_modes.pure_failure_pattern: Provides generic validation criteria instead of a decision tied to evidence.
failure_modes.casulo_control: Separate checklist suggestion from decision. Require status: validated, pending review, blocked or insufficient evidence.

failure_modes.name: production_readiness_leakage
failure_modes.description: The model suggests production readiness based on partial progress or vague tests.
failure_modes.pure_failure_pattern: Says possibly yes if tests passed, without evidence or gate state.
failure_modes.casulo_control: Require production gate, sandbox flag, evidence status, blocked production_activation and human approval state.

failure_modes.name: api_contract_hallucination
failure_modes.description: The model invents endpoints, payloads, authentication patterns, status codes or error responses.
failure_modes.pure_failure_pattern: Produces plausible API integration without OpenAPI or real contract.
failure_modes.casulo_control: Require OpenAPI/schema, endpoint inventory, mock fixtures and contract tests.

failure_modes.name: generic_rag_answer_without_gate
failure_modes.description: The model uses retrieved context to answer better but does not enforce gates, blocked actions or permitted output modes.
failure_modes.typical_prompt: Com base nesses documentos, o que fazemos agora?
failure_modes.casulo_control: Transform retrieved context into state packet with gate, risk, evidence, blocked actions and next allowed action.

failure_modes.name: business_recommendation_without_limits
failure_modes.description: The model recommends a package or roadmap without implementation boundaries, risk, governance, dependency or blocked actions.
failure_modes.casulo_control: Require company profile, risk level, package candidate, gates, safe scope and blocked implementation actions.

failure_modes.name: context_contamination
failure_modes.description: A supposedly pure capture contains vocabulary, gates or project context from prior conversation.
failure_modes.pure_failure_pattern: Pure answer mentions CASULO, gates, runbooks or batch details without being given them.
failure_modes.casulo_control: Require clean chat/source metadata and mark contaminated captures as exploratory only.

failure_modes.name: provider_contamination
failure_modes.description: Responses from different providers or models are mixed into a GPT-only batch without provider labels.
failure_modes.pure_failure_pattern: Gemini, GPT and other outputs are merged under same capture ID.
failure_modes.casulo_control: Require provider/model/source fields and separate exploratory captures from calibration captures.

failure_modes.name: ui_metadata_contamination
failure_modes.description: UI text such as thinking time, timestamps, buttons or disclaimers is copied into model response evidence.
failure_modes.pure_failure_pattern: Includes 'Pensou por', timestamps, 'Convidar membros da equipe' or provider UI notices.
failure_modes.casulo_control: Require cleaning rules and raw vs cleaned response fields.

benchmark_families.name: Parser Grounding Benchmark
benchmark_families.purpose: Compare generic parser generation against parser generation grounded in real workbook inventory, schema, fixtures and golden output.

benchmark_families.name: Repo Patch Grounding Benchmark
benchmark_families.purpose: Compare generic patch suggestions against patches grounded in current git state, files, tests and validator evidence.

benchmark_families.name: Workbook / Excel Contract Benchmark
benchmark_families.purpose: Measure field, sheet, schema and archive/core mapping hallucination against real workbook contracts.

benchmark_families.name: API Contract Benchmark
benchmark_families.purpose: Measure endpoint/payload/auth/status hallucination against OpenAPI and contract tests.

benchmark_families.name: Production Gate Benchmark
benchmark_families.purpose: Measure production/client/merge boundary leakage with and without gates and blocked actions.

benchmark_families.name: RAG vs Operational State Control Benchmark
benchmark_families.purpose: Compare document-grounded RAG answer against state-packet answer with gates, blocked actions and validation outputs.

benchmark_families.name: Business Recommendation Boundary Benchmark
benchmark_families.purpose: Compare generic service recommendation against package recommendation with safe scope, risk and gates.
